message.content:
Apply glassmorphism visual changes to these files in C:\Users\User\RickCitedByAstroLab\pages\:
- BotTracking.tsx
- Reputation.tsx
- ContentWriter.tsx
- SMCStudio.tsx
- AiCitationSimulator.tsx

CRITICAL RULE: Do NOT modify any functionality, event handlers, state, props, imports, logic, or component structure. ONLY change visual CSS classes/styles.

For EACH file, make these changes:
1. Replace `bg-[#111111]` with `bg-white/[0.04] backdrop-blur-sm` for card/container/input elements
2. Replace `bg-[#1a1d21]` with `bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-xl` for tooltip/overlay elements  
3. Replace `bg-[#13131d]` with `bg-white/[0.04] backdrop-blur-lg` for panel/section backgrounds
4. Replace `bg-[#0f1115]` with `bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-xl` for modal/section backgrounds
5. Do NOT change .ninja-card usages (already handled by CSS globally)
6. Do NOT change any className involving `bg-gradient`, `bg-purple`, `bg-emerald`, `bg-red`, `bg-amber`, `bg-blue`, `bg-green` or other colored backgrounds
7. Do NOT add or remove any elements
8. Keep code blocks/pre dark for readability (`bg-[#0a0a12]` can stay)
9. Do NOT change the modal backdrop (`bg-black/80`)

Be conservative - if uncertain about a change, skip it.

content.text: I'll start by reading all five files to understand their current content before making changes.
Now I have a clear picture of all five files. Let me create a task list and systematically apply the glassmorphism changes to each file.

content.text:
All five files have been successfully updated with glassmorphism visual changes. Here is a summary of what was done:

## Summary of Changes

### Pattern Applied
Every instance of `bg-[#111111]` was replaced with `bg-white/[0.04] backdrop-blur-sm` across all five files. No other target patterns (`bg-[#1a1d21]`, `bg-[#13131d]`, `bg-[#0f1115]`) were found in any of these files, so no additional replacements were needed.

### File-by-File Breakdown

**`C:\Users\User\RickCitedByAstroLab\pages\BotTracking.tsx`** -- 9 replacements:
- 4 KPI cards (Bots Actifs, Crawls Aujourd'hui, Crawls Semaine, Pages Indexees)
- 1 Activity Chart container
- 1 Bot List container
- 1 Alerts panel
- 1 Timeline Live panel
- 1 Top Pages panel

**`C:\Users\User\RickCitedByAstroLab\pages\Reputation.tsx`** -- 9 replacements:
- 1 main form container
- 3 dashboard result cards (visibility score, sentiment gauge, breakdown)
- 1 top themes card
- 1 competitor comparison card
- 1 alerts card
- 1 mentions card
- 1 recommendations card

**`C:\Users\User\RickCitedByAstroLab\pages\ContentWriter.tsx`** -- 8 replacements:
- All form input fields (brandName, brandUrl, productOrService, targetAudience, tone select, language select, textarea) and one additional input element

**`C:\Users\User\RickCitedByAstroLab\pages\SMCStudio.tsx`** -- 9 replacements:
- All form input fields (fiche name, fiche features textarea, faq topic, faq context textarea, article title, article URL)
- 1 tab switcher container

**`C:\Users\User\RickCitedByAstroLab\pages\AiCitationSimulator.tsx`** -- 4 replacements:
- All form input fields (query, brandName, brandUrl, industry)

### What Was NOT Changed (per instructions):
- No `ninja-card` usages were modified
- No gradient backgrounds (`bg-gradient-*`) were touched
- No colored backgrounds (`bg-purple-*`, `bg-emerald-*`, `bg-red-*`, `bg-amber-*`, `bg-blue-*`, `bg-rose-*`, etc.) were changed
- No `bg-black/80` modal backdrops were changed
- No dark code block backgrounds (`bg-[#0a0a12]`, `bg-[#0a0a0a]`, `bg-[#050208]`) were changed
- No elements were added or removed
- No functionality, event handlers, state, props, imports, logic, or component structure was modified
